Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and promotes a 'lifelong leisure sport,' which contributes to sustainable lifestyles (Target 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly '男女合班' (male and female), ensuring equal participation in sports education, which aligns with Target 5.1 and 5.5.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The '男女合班' (male and female) format promotes social inclusion and ensures equal opportunity regardless of sex, aligning with Target 10.2 and 10.3.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Inferred link to Target 16.3 by teaching rules, refereeing ('學習裁判執法經驗'), and fostering 'good social behavior and teamwork spirit,' promoting fairness and rule of law in sport.
